_comment: Maps each norm PDF filename (placed in this folder) to its metadata. doc_id in Qdrant is derived as slug(norm_name)_version, so version must change whenever a document is superseded.

documents._verify: No version/date found in the document itself or via web search (checked crsbis.in, meity.gov.in). Covers Phase-I CRS product categories only (15 categories from the 2012 order) — later CRS phases (II-VII) added more categories not covered here.

documents.filename: Public Procurement Policy for Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) Order, 2012.pdf
documents._verify: This is only the original 2012 base order. Confirmed via the official Gazette (S.O. 5670(E), 9 Nov 2018) that a 2018 Amendment Order changed the procurement target from 20% to 25% and added a 3% women-owned-MSE sub-target, effective 1 April 2019 — not yet sourced/ingested as a separate document. See ROADMAP.md.
